title: BEM-845 execute 844
objective:

"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 13:53 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
route=load('governance/state/bem844_route_after_bem843.json')
rs=route.get('status','unknown')
created_files=[]
if rs=='route_process_real_response':
    status='process_real_response_selected'
    next_action='parse real Claude response into agreed protocol'
elif rs=='route_repair_pending_queue_processing':
    status='queue_processing_repair_selected'
    next_action='inspect remaining queue files and harden queue processor removal/result writing'
elif rs in ['route_repair_dispatch_result_writer']:
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem845_dispatch_result_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'codex-runner.yml','workflow_id':'codex-runner.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-845 dispatch result writer probe','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='dispatch_result_probe_queued'
    next_action='tick and verify dispatch result writer'
elif rs in ['route_repair_runtime_state']:
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem845_runtime_state_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-845 runtime state repair probe','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='runtime_state_probe_queued'
    next_action='tick and verify runtime state'
elif rs in ['route_repair_response_writer']:
    mail=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem845_real_response_retry.md')
    mail.write_text('# BEM-845 | REAL RESPONSE RETRY'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Claude Internal Auditor must provide a real Decision response for the multi-agent protocol. Write to claude_to_gpt. No issue comments.'+sep)
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem845_real_response_dispatch.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-845 real response retry','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.extend([str(mail),str(q)])
    status='real_response_retry_queued'
    next_action='tick and verify real response'
else:
    status='unknown_route_noop_recorded'
    next_action='verify triad again and diagnose route mismatch'
state={'bem':'BEM-845','status':status,'route_status':rs,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem845_execute_bem844_route.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem845_execute_bem844_route.md').write_text('# BEM-845 | Execute BEM-844 Route | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem845_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-845'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem845_execute_bem844_route.json','governance/reports/bem845_execute_bem844_route.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem845_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-844 route by queuing the appropriate proof retry or selecting real response processing')
"""
No issue comments.
